overview: A calm, trust-building psychological counselling website for a private clinic. Features a full landing page with hero, emotional connection sections, services, 3-step process, about therapist, testimonials, and a Headspace-inspired footer — all with soft colors, scroll animations, and serif/sans-serif typography.
features: Hero section with empathetic headline and dual CTAs
Playfair Display serif headings + Inter body font
Soft color palette: blue, sage green, warm beige, lavender
